title: Post-review fixes: fortress enforcement, betray label, war helper, log cap
description: Address issues found in semantic review: (1) Fix fortress enforcement to also check monsters, (2) Add dedicated i18n key for betray mandate label, (3) Extract war phase detection helper to reduce duplication, (4) Remove slice(-20) cap for archived season logs.
steps: Fix fortress enforcement guard to include monster type in gameLogic.ts
Add dedicated i18n key for betray mandate label in en.ts and es.ts
Update ActionPanel.tsx to use the new betray label key
Remove slice(-20) cap for archived season logs in GameLog.tsx
acceptance_criteria: Fortress enforcement applies to both bushi and monster figure types
Betray mandate label uses a dedicated translation key instead of string manipulation
War phase detection logic is extracted into a helper function
Archived season logs display all entries without truncation
